## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] feat: new capability
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: internal change
- [ ] chore: tooling or maintenance
- [ ] docs: documentation only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run -w @workforce/web e2e` (when relevant)

## Spec Coverage

- [ ] Business rules in [spec.md](spec.md) are preserved
- [ ] Required validations are implemented
- [ ] Edge cases are covered by tests

## Release Notes Input

Conventional commit summary for release notes:

`type(scope): short summary`

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No infra/runtime impact
- [ ] Requires environment variable or secret change
- [ ] Requires database migration

If any of the above are required, document exact steps here.
